steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage explicitly states the discrepancy between the two species' responses to lunar intensity “is explicable in terms of OFT,” meaning OFT can explain why different species respond differently to the same ecological circumstance.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the answer
steps.content: Choice A directly states the signal — OFT “can account for observations of different species responding differently to similar ecological circumstances.” The other three either reverse the passage's claim, invent unsupported distinctions, or misrepresent what the species demonstrate. That matches choice A — A is correct.
